chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 233 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.1150/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 23-10-2025 M/s Sohail Ahmed Khoso and Aijaz Ahmed Sipra, Advocates for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner had preferred a Representation under Regulation 161 of the Sindh Public Service Commission (Recruitment Management) Regulations, 2023, which was declined by the Respondents / Competent Authority. Learned Counsel further contends that although the Petitioner thereafter preferred a re-appeal, no order has been passed thereon to date. It is further submitted that due to the pendency of the present Petition, the Petitioner could not file an Appeal against the said order, which has consequently become time-barred. Learned Counsel, therefore, submits that the Petitioner may be permitted to file a fresh Appeal against the order passed by the Single Member Bench before the Two-Member Bench. Learned Additional AG does not oppose the request and concedes to the condonation of delay in filing the Appeal before the Two-Member Bench. In view of the above, this Petition, along with the listed application is disposed of. The delay in filing the Appeal against the order of the Single Member Bench is hereby condoned. The Petitioner is permitted to file a fresh Appeal before the Two-Member Bench within fifteen days from the date of this order. Judge Judge ARBROHI
